# `mod`

**Systems:** PX86, M1ARM  
**Parameters:** `i,i`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Returns the modulo of parameter 1 with parameter 2.
<p><strong>Examples:</strong></p>
<p><code>i:=mod(i+1,10);  // is is kept between 0 and 9
<p><code>k:=mod(k*2,j);  // is is kept between 0 and j




</div>
